title: Chang et al. 2025 — A multi-paradigm EEG dataset for studying upper limb rehabilitation exercises (Lanzhou Jiaotong University)
description: A multi-paradigm EEG dataset comprising scalp electroencephalography recordings from 28 participants performing and imagining upper-limb rehabilitation exercises. This dataset is designed to support research on motor imagery and rehabilitation brain-computer interfaces (BCI) for upper-limb motor function recovery and assessment.
methods_description: Scalp EEG recordings were acquired while participants performed or imagined upper-limb rehabilitation exercises under a multi-paradigm protocol. The dataset includes motor imagery task data (task-imagery) organized in BIDS format across 28 subjects.
